prose:
Frontier-orbital gap of O2 (triplet ground state)

Method provenance:
• Property: HOMO–LUMO (Koopmans-style) energy gap, eV
• Level of theory: DFT, tier "standard" → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fitted) in PySCF  (frontier-orbitals skill)
• Geometry: user-supplied experimental O₂ geometry from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz; single-point calculation, no re-optimization (DFT//exp-geom)
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
• Charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet; UKS treatment)
• SCF converged in 7 cycles; total electronic energy −150.38872 Ha (−4092.2855 eV)
• Live log: the calculation streamed to a frontier_<timestamp>.out file in the working directory while running (tail-able for SCF progress)

Headline result (reported exactly as returned by chemkit):
HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV

Caveats & warnings (verbatim):
• common header present
• headline field 'homo_lumo_gap_eV' = 5.2880585663493065 (present and numeric)

Integrity verdict: ok (trustworthy = true)

The result was obtained with chemkit’s frontier-orbitals skill invoking PySCF at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (density-fitting on) in the gas phase.
